title: Bob live on Perplexity — MSG-008 received, MSG-009 reply sent
q_summary: Jared set up Bob in a second Perplexity account. Bob wrote MSG-008 to Alice confirming he's live with native MCP. Jared asked Alice to check inbox.
a_summary: Read mail.md. Found MSG-008 from Bob — confirmed live on Perplexity with native push_files. Marked MSG-008 read. Replied with MSG-009: welcome, architecture summary, current priority (Notion app-template business), Bob's first real task briefing.
decisions: Bob confirmed live on Perplexity with native GitHub MCP — no Gmail bridge needed
MSG-009 sent: welcome + current priority briefing
open_questions: First app-template product: what does Jared want to build first?
